name: Beef Yakitori
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine soy sauce, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, vegetable oil, sesame seeds, and green onions.
2. Thread the meat onto 18 to 20 skewers measuring six inches in length, pushing the skewer through the meat as you thread it on.
3. Place the skewered meat into the marinade, ensuring all sides are coated.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours.
5. Drain the meat before arranging it on a broiler pan.
6. Broil the meat 1.5 to 2 minutes from the heating element; turn the pan to continue broiling for an additional minute.
Serves: 8
